spline_animation_speedIf not 0, spline will spin around. Higher the value, the slower it will spin. If set negative will spin opposite direction.0F32
spline_tile_countDefault to 1 to have regular behaviour, this is how many times will repeat texture along spline1I32
composite_sceneThis is composite scene that will be rendered in centre (in same fashion as central vfx)OptionalStringU8
is_targetting_per_entityThis is for single click abilities where want aoe display to be shown per entity rather than per unit (mainly gyrobombers bomb drop ability)falseBoolean
vfx_ring_segment_lengthIf set to value other than -1, this is used to create number of segments instead of spline tile count-1I32
use_model_timeIf true will animate in model time not real timefalseBoolean

spawn_no_proxyIf you want to disable showing the spawned unit proxy/decal, please set this value to truefalseBoolean

battle_camera_shake_parameters_tables v0 · 20 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
attackAttack = ramp up, Decay = drop to sustain level, Sustain = plateau, release = ramp off. Image search for ADSR envelope online for a visual representation of the attack,decay,sustain,release curve. Attack is the ramp up of camera shake (time in seconds).0.10000000149011612F32
decayAttack = ramp up, Decay = drop to sustain level, Sustain = plateau, release = ramp off. Image search for ADSR envelope online for a visual representation of the attack,decay,sustain,release curve. Decay is the drop from the attack height to the sustain height (time in seconds).0.20000000298023224F32
fall_off_distanceDistance, in metres, from the camera shake position, that the camera shake drops to zero.20F32
horizontal_amplitudeHorizontal movement amplitude of the camera0.10000000149011612F32
horizontal_frequencyHorizontal movement frequency of the camera3F32
KEY keyStringU8
octave_amplitude_multiplierThis is an overall master controller for the amplitude of the noise used in the camera shake. This is a multiplier which is applied to all of the amplitude controls in the table.0.5F32
octave_frequency_multiplierThis is an overall master controller for the frequency of the noise used in the camera shake. This is a multiplier which is applied to all of the frequency controls in the table.2F32
octavesOctaves controls the levels of noise applied to the camera shake. Each layer is higher in frequency and with less amplitude than the previous layer. Each new layer will add more expense to the setup.1I32
pitch_amplitudeRotation amplitude around the horizontal axis of the camera. Image search for \'roll pitch yaw\' for a diagram.0.10000000149011612F32
pitch_frequencyRotation frequency around the horizontal axis of the camera. Image search for \'roll pitch yaw\' for a diagram.2F32
releaseAttack = ramp up, Decay = drop to sustain level, Sustain = plateau, release = ramp off. Image search for ADSR envelope online for a visual representation of the attack,decay,sustain,release curve. Release is the ramp off of camera shake (time in seconds).2F32
roll_amplitudeRotation amplitude around the axis the camera is pointing in. Image search for \'roll pitch yaw\' for a diagram.0.10000000149011612F32
roll_frequencyRotation frequency around the axis the camera is pointing in. Image search for \'roll pitch yaw\' for a diagram.2F32
sustainAttack = ramp up, Decay = drop to sustain level, Sustain = plateau, release = ramp off. Image search for ADSR envelopse online for a visual representation of the curve. Sustain is the plateau of camera shake (time in seconds).0.30000001192092896F32
sustain_multiplierThe sustain multiplier is a proportion of the maximum attack value on the curve. So, if the maximum attack value reaches 2.5 and the sustain multiplier is 0.5, then the sustain value is 1.25. Image search for ADSR envelope online for a visual representation of the attack,decay,sustain,release curve.0.5F32
vertical_amplitudeVerticall movement amplitude of the camera0.10000000149011612F32
vertical_frequencyVerticall movement frequency of the camera3F32
yaw_amplitudeRotation amplitude around the vertical axis of the camera, like on a tripod. Image search for \'roll pitch yaw\' for a diagram.0.10000000149011612F32
yaw_frequencyRotation frequency around the vertical axis of the camera, like on a tripod. Image search for \'roll pitch yaw\' for a diagram.2F32

decelerationNeeds to be larger than acceleration value to avoid attack movement bugs0F32

radius0F32

radii_ratio0F32
mass0F32
height0F32
fire_arc_closeDefines the unit's firing arc visualization. Does not effect the actual firing arc. Might need to be defined on a articulated_entity.0F32
turn_speed0F32
hit_points0I32
allow_turn_to_move_animtrueBoolean
allow_static_turn_animtrueBoolean
min_turning_speed0F32
fly_speedSpeed of the entity when in the air (as opposed to moving on the ground)0F32
flying_charge_speedCharge speed of the entity when in the air (as opposed to moving on the ground)0F32
sizeSize of entity for collision priority and combatbattle_entities_size_enums_tables.keyStringU8
strafe_speed0F32
gradient_strategyGradient alignment strategybattle_entities_gradient_strategy_enums_tables.keyStringU8
audio_entity_typeAssigns an audio entity to a battle entity. Can be overridden by specific tagging in the audio variant editor.audio_entity_types_tables.keyStringU8
combat_reaction_radiusRadius at which entity will trigger combat with nearby enemy0F32
entity_effectsbattle_entity_effects_junctions_tables.keyStringU8
hit_reactions_ignore_chancePercentage chance to ignore hit reactions, after rules application.0I32
knock_interrupts_ignore_chancePercentage chance to ignore knock interrupts, after rules application.0I32
soft_collision_offset_zOffset the soft collision volume along the z-axis.0F32
can_climb_ladder_and_stair_pipesfalseBoolean
projectile_intersection_radius_ratioRatio of the radius to use for projectile intersections (usually < 1)1F32
projectile_penetration_speed_changeRatio of projectile speed retained when it penetrates this entity.0.949999988079071F32
projectile_penetration_resistanceAdded to the projectile penetration counter. Higher number means this entity can stop projectiles more easily.1I32
aura_vfxOptionalStringU8
porthole_cameraOverride camera that will be used instead of record in main_unit record if existsunit_porthole_camera_settings_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
min_tracking_ratioMinimum ratio of move speed that an entity can slow down for formed movement0.5F32
max_tracking_ratioMaximum ratio of move speed that an entity can speed up for formed movement1.4500000476837158F32
vfx_filter_idUsed to filter effect metadata that should only trigger for some entities and not others, e.g. heroes. The \'id\' field of the metadata must match this id if not 0, to be triggered.0I32
can_cast_projectiledoes this entity cast a projectile spellfalseBoolean
porthole_composite_sceneFull path of composite scene to use for porthole in battle (optional, if empty will just render unit from battle. Only required for special circumstances like chariots)OptionalStringU8
has_bloodWhether this entity can bleed (NOT if the model can receive blood on it - that is controlled in the model\'s material)trueBoolean
can_dismemberWhether this entity can be dismemberedtrueBoolean
combat_camera_shakeCamera shake parameters to use for combat animations. This to tied to metadata.battle_camera_shake_parameters_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
dismember_head_alive_hp_ratioIf +ve, this entity can have its head dismembered while still alive. Value is fraction of full hitpoints.-1F32
dismember_arms_alive_hp_ratioIf +ve, this entity can have its arms dismembered while still alive. Value is fraction of full hitpoints.-1F32
jump_attack_chancePercentage chance of performing jump attack (0..100)30I32
locomotion_constantsSet of locomotion constants, related to entity size.battle_entity_locomotion_constants_tables.keyStringU8
enable_engine_crew_turn_in_movement_directionEngine crew will turn to face their direction of movement rather than use the engine\'s orientationfalseBoolean
dealt_collision_knocked_flying_threshold_multiplierMultiplier for the collision speed delta threshold to apply to the victim of the collision1F32
dealt_collision_knocked_down_threshold_multiplierMultiplier for the collision speed delta threshold to apply to the victim of the collision1F32
dealt_collision_knocked_back_threshold_multiplierMultiplier for the collision speed delta threshold to apply to the victim of the collision1F32
anim_lod_distance_multiplierMultiplier for the distance at which animation quality is reduced.1F32
size_for_animation_lodSize of entity for animation lod tech, if not defined it will default to the entity size (please be mindful about performance when setting this to a high value)battle_entities_size_enums_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
leaves_collision_when_diesLeaves collision of entity when diesfalseBoolean
stop_before_turnEnable/disable stopping before turn.falseBoolean

face_destination_tolerance_angleAcceptable tolerance from the actual facing angle.F32
force_initial_turn_angleThe entity will not perform an immediate initial turn unless the angle to turn by is larger than this value.F32
KEY keyStringU8
max_standing_turn_speedMaximum movement speed that allows to turn on the spot.F32
min_stopping_distanceDistance tolerance between entity and target at which to stop \'normal\' (less precise) movement.F32
min_turn_to_move_distance(unused) Minimum distance to target at which turning while moving can be activated.F32
precise_distanceDistance at which precise movement (and strafing) is activated.F32
precise_movement_completion_distanceDistance tolerance between entity and target at which to stop precise movement.F32
engine_crew_max_turn_deltaMaximum angle the crew can turn at once35F32
engine_crew_enable_bearing_toleranceAllows crew to only face in the general direction of movement rather than direcly in the direction they are walking intrueBoolean

autonomous_rider_heroIf this is true, and the entity is an autonomous rider, the entity will assume the uniform of the agent from the campaign map.<br><br>Also, if this rider is mounted on a war machine/chariot and can use a magic missile, this should be set to true.<br>falseBoolean

NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType

battle_vortexs_tables v19 (7 versions) · 33 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
change_max_angleDetermines the maximum angle for the random change in direction of travel. Max is 360 degrees. 0 means that angle will never be changed.I32
contact_effectIf the vortex hits an entity, this ‘special_ability_phase’ will be applied on their unit.special_ability_phases_tables.idOptionalStringU8
damagebase damage dealt by the vortex at 100% damage scaling. Damage scales linearly towards the edge of the vortex radius.I32
damage_aparmour-piercing damage dealt by the vortex at 100% damage scaling.I32
durationDetermines how long a vortex explosion will last in seconds.F32
expansion_speedDetermines the rate of expansion for the vortex. This value is per second. Expansion speed is also multiplied with ‘detonation_force’ to calculate momentum for impacts (knock back, knocked down, knocked flying). Note, vortices can have negative expansion speed, which will drag entities towards the centre of the vortex. If you use a negative expansion speed, start and goal radius need to be the same.F32
goal_radiusDetermines the ultimate radius for the vortex. The vortex explosion will expand per second according to the ‘expansion_speed’ until goal radius is reached.F32
infinite_heightif set to yes the vortex will become a cylinder with infinite height rather than a globe.Boolean
move_change_freqDetermines how frequently the vortex movement will change direction of travel. This represents seconds.F32
movement_speedDetermines whether the centre of the vortex will move and a what speed. If movement_speed is 0, the vortex will stay static. This speed is meters per second.F32
start_radiusDetermines the starting radius for the vortex. This is in meters.F32
KEY vortex_keyStringU8
ignition_amountIf set to a value higher than 0, it will deal fire damage.0F32
is_magicalif yes it will deal magical damage.falseBoolean
composite_scenelinks to a ‘composite_scene’, which is how we deliver the VFX and sounds for vortices.composite_scene_files_tables.scene_filepathStringU8
detonation_forceDetermines the force of impact for the vortex explosion. Multiplied with expansion speed to determine impact momentum.10F32
launch_sourcedetermines where the vortex will be launched from. Target_centre is used for explosions and vortices, target_near_centre for winds and breaths, activator front for vortices like night goblin fanatics.battle_vortex_launch_sources_tables.suggested_launch_sourcetarget_centreStringU8
building_collisionIf the vortex centre collides with a building, will it “1.ignore”= bounce back into the opposite direction of travel or “2. Expire”=end.battle_vortex_collision_responses_tables.vortex_collision_typeStringU8
launch_vfxparticle_effects_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
height_off_groundDetermines the height for the centre of the vortex. Keep this at 0 unless you want to make a vortex that hits flyers mostly.F32
delayWe do spawn this at the same time as usual, but we wait this time to cause damage / move / collide etc.0F32
num_vortexesHow many vortices do we spawn. These are staggered, launching one per second.1I32
composite_scene_bloodBlood versioncomposite_scene_files_tables.scene_filepathOptionalStringU8
affects_alliesDoes it affect friendly unitstrueBoolean
launch_source_offsetused by AI to optimal targeting offset for breaths and winds.0F32
composite_scene_groupVia group we can configure multiple composite scenes per Vortex Spellbattle_vortex_composite_scene_groups_tables.group_idOptionalStringU8
delay_between_vortexes1F32
is_spellIs the spell damage affected by spell resistance!falseBoolean
shapebattle_vortex_shapes_tables.shapeStringU8
start_heightDetermines the starting height for the vortex in the case shape is rectangle. This is in meters.0F64
goal_heightDetermines the ultimate height for the vortex in the case shape is rectangle. The vortex explosion will expand per second according to the ‘expansion_speed’ until goal height is reached.0F64
affects_enemiestrueBoolean
follow_targetIf \'true\' the vortex will follow the target unit with movement_speed but ignoring all other movement propertiesfalseBoolean

KEY existing_building_chain_keyThe building chain of the existing building, must match up with the super chain and building level and is a strictly necessary fieldbuilding_chains_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
KEY existing_building_level_inclusive_endbuilding_levels_tables.level_nameOptionalStringU8
KEY existing_building_level_inclusive_startbuilding_levels_tables.level_nameOptionalStringU8
KEY potential_buiding_chain_keybuilding_chains_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
KEY potential_building_level_inclusive_endThe last level of the building chain which will have the synergy bonus/malus applied to them. I strongly recommend leaving this at 1 if you are applying a large malus as otherwise, if the AI conquers a settlement with this chain in it, the AI will be unable to upgrade that chainbuilding_levels_tables.level_nameOptionalStringU8
KEY potential_building_level_inclusive_startThe first level of the building chain which will have the synergy bonus/malus applied to thembuilding_levels_tables.level_nameOptionalStringU8

cai_personalities_budget_allocations_tables v3 (2 versions) · 38 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
agents_funding_cap0I32
agents_funds_allocation_percentage0I32
agents_percentage_of_pool_to_save_on_fail0I32
agents_turns_of_inactivity_until_cap-1I32
army_funding_capIn case of inactivity (left number of turns not spending), the size of this budget pool will be restricted to the specified amount. So you can setup things like: if the construction budget isn\'t used for 5 rounds, only allow 1000 money to be stored here, distribute the rest among other pools.0I32
army_funds_allocation_percentage0I32
army_percentage_of_pool_to_save_on_fail0I32
army_turns_of_inactivity_until_capIf this pool isn\'t being used at all for the specified amount of rounds, the AI will "release" this pool and will only put a restricted amount here (x_funding_cap), the rest will be distributed among other pools. As soon as the pool gets used, this timer re-sets and the AI changes back to the normal usage of the pool. This is to ensure that the AI doesn\'t hold money in unused pools-1I32
construction_funding_cap0I32
construction_funds_allocation_percentage0I32
construction_percentage_of_pool_to_save_on_fail0I32
construction_turns_of_inactivity_until_cap-1I32
diplomacy_funding_cap0I32
diplomacy_funds_allocation_percentage0I32
diplomacy_percentage_of_pool_to_save_on_fail0I32
diplomacy_turns_of_inactivity_until_cap-1I32
KEY keyStringU8
navy_funding_cap0I32
navy_funds_allocation_percentage0I32
navy_percentage_of_pool_to_save_on_fail0I32
navy_turns_of_inactivity_until_cap-1I32

maximum_settable_tax_leveltaxes_levels_tables.tax_levelStringU8
technology_funds_allocation_percentage0I32

cai_personality_deal_evaluation_components_tables v16 (4 versions) · 32 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
KEY idStringU8
max_payment_valueMaximum deal value that a payment can provide. The source of the \'I paid the faction 20 billion gold but they still didn\'t want a deal\' posts you see on reddit0F32
payment_treachery_valueUnused0F32
payment_offered_multiplier_underIf the source faction (us) is giving away money the value and we are under the amount of money we have available for diplomacy the value of the payment is modified by this value before being divided by our GDP to convert it into deal evaluation weights up until the max maxyment value0F32
payment_requested_multiplierIf the source faction (us) is receiving money this value of the payment is multiplied by this number before then being divided by our GDP to give its deal evaluation weight up to the max_payment_value0F32
payment_offered_multiplier_overIf the source faction (us) is giving away money the value and we are over the amount of money we have available for diplomacy the value of the payment is modified by this value before being divided by our GDP to convert it into deal evaluation weights up until the max maxyment value0F32
peace_penaltyApplies to make peace less likely after a war delecartion. Linearly scales to zero in peace_penalty_turns. Also applies to any wars declared at the start of the game0F32
peace_penalty_turns1F32
war_penaltySee peace penalty, except reverse, makes wars less likely after peace has just been signed. Also applied to all factions at the start of the game0F32
war_penalty_turns1F32
trespassing_peace_effect_multipliermultiplier on diplomatic attitude impact of previous trespassing events to convert impact of trespassing into a value used for deal evaluation, up to specified cap0F32
trespassing_peace_effect_cap0F32
trespassing_war_effect_multiplier0F32
trespassing_war_effect_cap0F32
confederation_bonusAI to AI only, applies when strength of new faction is under value specified in cai_variables or cai_variables_overrides0F32
short_descriptiondiplomacy_strings_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
long_descriptiondiplomacy_strings_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
war_break_treaty_bonus_towards_victory_region_ownerseffectively deprecated following deprecation of victory region_system. Use the per-treaty personality region group value instead0F32
peace_sign_treaty_penalty_towards_victory_region_ownerseffectively deprecated following deprecation of victory region_system0F32
our_citizenry_confederation_multiplierA value used to multiply the total strength of our armed citizenry (so garrisons) during evaluation for confederation deal.0F32
their_citizenry_confederation_multiplierA value used to multiply the total strength of their citizenry during evaluation for confederation deal.0F32
nonpenalised_trade_agreement_baseThe base amount of trade agreements before applying a penalty to the deal evaluation0F32
additional_nonpenalised_trade_agreements_per_regionThis factor is multiplied with every owned region and added to the trade agreement penalty limit0F32
trade_agreement_modifier_per_exceeded_trade_agreementsPenalty to apply for every trade agreement over the calculated maximum0F32
recent_treaty_modifier0F32
recent_treaty_modifier_turns0I64
recent_treaty_broken_modifier0F32
recent_treaty_broken_modifier_turns0I64
original_offer_modifier0F32
confederation_territory_gain_modifierThis value will apply for specified number of turns after the target last gained territory0F32
confederation_territory_gain_modifier_turns0I64
min_gdp_for_payment_evaluationWhen evaluating payment/gifts, use this gdp value if our current gdp is below it (or 0)1000I64

region_hint_base_valueIf the base_value is lower than the value_limit, then the delta is added to the base value per region the target owns of the source\'s region hint regions as defined in the personality_region_groups table. If the value_limit is lower than the base_value then the delta is subtracted0I32
region_hint_value_limitThe limit is automatically applies if all of the target\'s regions are in the source\'s currently active region groups0I32

cai_personality_deal_generation_components_tables v3 (2 versions) · 7 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
KEY idStringU8
relative_strength_payment_min_threshold0F32
relative_strength_payment_max_threshold0F32
relative_strength_payment_max_demand_percentage1F32
use_minimum_for_goal_evaluationsA boolean flag used for calculating the permitted goal evaluations per turn for this personality. Look at the description of goal_evaluations fields for the exact use of this field. Keep this off except for personalities that should be primarily inactive, in which case put a small number in goal_evaluations.falseBoolean
goal_evaluationsNumber of diplomacy goal evaluations this personality is allowed per turn. The actual amount is as follows: An intermediary value is formed as max(CAI variable max_goal_evalautions_per_faction, CAI variable max_goal_evalautions_per_round / alive non-rebel factions). If the field use_minimum_for_goal_evaluations is ticked, the final value is min(intermediary, goal_evaluations). Otherwise it is max(intermediary, goal_evaluations). Use this primarily to specify a larger number of permitted evaluations for certain personalities.0I32
ignore_war_restrictions_if_negative_event_rounds_agoIgnore war generation restrictions if a negative event has happened within the turn threshold-1I32

angry_reject_maxMaximum number of counter offers before AI breaks off the negotiation.I32
angry_reject_minMinimum number of counter offers before AI breaks off the negotiation.I32
KEY idStringU8
initial_declineProbability of declining the initial offer.I32
initial_counterProbability of countering the initial offer if able.I32
irrelevant_acceptProbability of declining a counter offer if irrelevant & acceptable.I32
irrelevant_declineProbability of declining a counter offer if irrelevant.I32
irrelevant_counter_newProbability of countering an irrevelant counter offer with another goal if one can be generated.I32
irrelevant_counter_lastProbability of countering an irrevelant counter offer with last goal.I32
max_interactionsMaximum number of times AI is going to start a negotiation in 1 turnI32
max_steps_above_acceptableMaximum number of steps above the acceptable payment that can be proposed.I32
no_payment_chanceProbability of not including payment in the initial offer of willing to offer it.I32
no_offer_chanceProbability of not offering anything to human players even if a goal was generated.I32
num_goals_generatedNumber of goals generated & evaluated before one is selected.I32
failed_payment_modMaximum payment AI will demand as a proportion of last failed demanded payment.1F32
no_offer_chance_falloffNo offer chance starts at 100 and linearly to value above in this many turns.0I32
ultimatum_chanceProbability of issuing an ultimatum for a deal that allows it.100I32
minimum_wait_between_offers_to_playerMinimum waiting time (in rounds) between non crucial offers to a single human player.5I32

campaign_autoresolver_skirmish_effectiveness_relative_to_speeds_tables v0 · 2 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
proportional_effectiveness_skirmisher_to_otherThe proportional effectiveness of the skirmisher against the other unit. 0.5 means both units get equal attack time. 0.75 means the skirmisher gets three times as much attack time as the other unit. Will be clamped between zero and one.F32
KEY relative_speed_skirmisher_to_otherThe relative speed of the skirmisher relative to the other unit at which this relative effectiveness applies. 1.0 means both units are the same speed. 2.0 means the skirmisher is twice as fast. 0.5 means the skirmisher is half the speed.F32

campaign_features_tables v0 · 3 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
availableIs this feature available to members of this group?trueBoolean
KEY featureA feature from the campaign_feature_ids table. These features are hooked up to code - do not add new ones unless you are also adding them in code.campaign_feature_ids_tables.idStringU8
KEY groupThe campaign group that this feature applies to. You can have multiple groups for a feature - group member priorities determine which entry has precedence.campaign_groups_tables.idStringU8

culture_settlement_occupation_options_groups_tables v0 · 9 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
KEY keyStringU8
occupation_option_template_button_idid for the template button used for the occupation option in "settlement_captured" panel (e.g "template_button_nor_allegiance")StringU8
custom_panel_layout_pathlayout path to a custom panel to use for choosing the occupation option (e.g "ui/campaign ui/dlc27_settlement_captured_gift_faction_choice")OptionalStringU8
custom_component_idid for a custom component to be used for choosing the occupation option instead of a separate panel; must be a child of the group\'s \'occupation_option_button_template_id\' component (e.g "option_choice_radial_menu" for "template_button_nor_allegiance")OptionalStringU8
occupation_entry_template_idid for the template component to spawn for each entry inside the custom component or custom panelStringU8
occupation_entry_image_indeximage index for the occupation entry template component; defaults to 00I32
show_choices_button_idid for the component to open the custom panel or show the custom component for this groupStringU8
edit_choice_button_idid for the component allow editing of the chosen occupation entry for this group after one has already been selectedStringU8
display_loot_when_no_option_selectedwhether to display the rewards/loot from the occupation option before a choice has been made; useful when each entry from the group has the same rewards/loottrueBoolean

operation_set_groups_tables v1 (2 versions) · 3 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
KEY group_nameStringU8
is_repeatableMakes it so the operation repeats whenever a person goes in and out of the bounds.falseBoolean
activate_fromSpecifies which direction we want the operation to activate from. If set to "bellow" it means that the operation will only activate when our resource is BELLOW the lower bound and we gain enough resources to reach the bounds. "above" means the opposite: that it will only activate if we\'re above the upper bound and we lose enough resources to go inside of the bounds.operation_set_activate_from_options_tables.optionboth_sidesStringU8

projectile_first_person_params_tables v1 · 18 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
angular_velocity_decayReduces the turning of the projectile after the player stopped turning it (a bit like fake air resistance)0.5F32
camera_y_offsetCam height1F32
camera_z_offsetCam distance from projectile3F32
drag_coefficentAir resistance. In combination with gravity, launch speed, lift and tail, this gives you control over the max range of the projectile. Values around 0.002 are good for the Doomdiver.0F32
gravity5F32
impact_view_distanceImpact cam distance10F32
impact_view_elevationImpact cam height30F32
impact_view_timeHow long the impact cam shows the impact position5F32
invert_pitch_controlInverted controls move the projectile up when moving the mouse downwardstrueBoolean
KEY keyStringU8
launch_elevation25F32
launch_speed50F32
lift_coefficenthigher values = easier to keep velocity and gain height0.2F32
mouse_sensitivity5e-05F32
tail_coefficenthigher values = increase resistance against the lift0.01F32
yaw_controlfalseBoolean
yaw_coefficient0F32
use_reload_stagefalseBoolean

steering_coefficientMultiplier to muzzle speed to get velocity correction per second.0.1F32

fuse_distance_from_targetThis will activate the explosion n metres from target. If n is greater than distance to target, then the explosion will occur instantly when the projectile is activated. To get beyond this, add a min_range to the projectile.0F32

ignition_amountHow much this explosion contributes towards causing ignition. Also, this determines it being flaming as a context0F32

detonation_damage_apHow much armour penetration damage this causes per entity hit0F32
camera_shakebattle_camera_shake_parameters_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
detonation_forceThis is how much force is applied to determine the result of being hit, for knockbacks etc.100F32

projectiles_tables v53 (6 versions) · 58 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
KEY keyStringU8
categorysome categories like artillery and misc ignore shields. Artillery also has a separate morale penalty.projectile_category_enum_tables.keyStringU8
shot_typeprojectile_shot_type_enum_tables.keyStringU8
explosion_typeprojectiles_explosions_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
spin_typeprojectiles_spin_type_enum_tables.keynoneStringU8
projectile_numberhow many projectiles are launched per fire pos/launch.0I32
trajectory_sightprojectile_trajectory_sight_enum_tables.keyStringU8
effective_rangeI32
minimum_range0I32
max_elevationThis is the maximum angle that the projectile can be fired at. Generally you want it high (max 90 degrees), and above 45. Except for special cases (e.g. cannon). Not used when trajectory is fixed!I32
muzzle_velocityThis describes the speed the projectile launches at (metres per second). If it is negative, the code will calculate this value based on firing at 45 degrees, hitting at the effective range. Not used when trajectory is fixed!F32
marksmanship_bonusBonus to accuracy inherent to projectile. Reduces size of calibration area together with a land_units accuracy stat.0F32
spread2F32
damage0I32
ap_damage0I32
can_bouncefalseBoolean
high_air_resistanceBoolean
collision_radiusUsed to calculate whether a projectile collides with a building.0F32
base_reload_time0F32
calibration_distanceThe distance at which the calibration area is at 100%.0F32
calibration_areaThe area within which the projectile can land when fired. Scales according to calibration distance and is reduced further by accuracy and marksmanship bonus.0F32
bonus_v_infantrydeals extra damage to entities that are small or very small. This bonus damage used the armour-piercing ration of the total projectile damage.0I32
bonus_v_largedeals extra damage to entities that are medium or larger. This bonus damage used the armour-piercing ration of the total projectile damage.0I32
projectile_displayprojectile_displays_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
overhead_stat_effectApply this special ability phase when projectile travels over a unit.special_ability_phases_tables.idnullOptionalStringU8
projectile_audioaudio_projectiles_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
shockwave_radiusDetermines radius around the projectile where damage will still be dealt. Allows near misses to still deal damage.-1F32
can_damage_buildingsfalseBoolean
contact_stat_effectApply this special ability phase when projectile hits a unit.OptionalStringU8
gravityUse this value to make projectiles be more / less affected by gravity. This is mainly used as a representation of wind resistance, so that projectiels can hang in the air. Negative means to use \'normal\' gravity.-1F32
burst_sizeNumber of shots in a single burst (value of 1 means no burst mode)1I32
burst_shot_delayDetermines the delay between each shot of the same burst0F32
massMass of the projectile.1F32
homing_paramsLink to projectile_homing_params table.projectile_homing_params_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
first_person_paramsprojectile_first_person_params_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
ignition_amountHow much do we contribute to setting things on fire. Also, if this value is greater than 0, this is considered a flaming attack0F32
is_magicalAre we considered magical, for contextual reasonsfalseBoolean
can_target_airborneCan this projectile target a flying unittrueBoolean
can_damage_alliestrueBoolean
fixed_elevationElevation of fixed trajectory45I32
projectile_penetrationprojectile_penetration_junctions_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
expiry_rangeIf this value is positive it dictactes the maximum distance a projectile can travel before it expires-1I32
is_beam_launch_burstLaunch beams will attempt to make the vfx match the projectiles travel, and apply a clipping plane when a projectile hits something, culling the projectiles in frontfalseBoolean
expire_on_impactIf true, the projectile will expire on impact, and will not stick into, or deflect off the object it hitfalseBoolean
can_rollCan the projectile roll on the groundfalseBoolean
trail_always_onIf this flag is on, then the trail will always get displayed, regardless of the UI preference for showing projectile trailsfalseBoolean
shots_per_volleyUsually units shoot 1 hot per volley, but some animations have multiple fire points, such as multi-shot artillery units. Most of the logic isn\'t aware of this, so this field is for reference for those systems1I32
fired_by_mountIf this flag is on (and the firing entity is a macro entity) the mount will fire, rather than the riderfalseBoolean
lock_on_multiple_fire_posWhen this is true, all fire positions in an animation will aim at the original position of the target, otherwise they will track the target positionfalseBoolean
prefer_central_targetsPrefer entities nearer the centre of the target (rather than closest in firing arc)falseBoolean
can_damage_vehiclesBoolean
building_damage_multiplierDamage multiplier applied when hitting buildings or vehicles<br>Artillery has a bespoke 1.5 multiplier with the following exceptions<br>Exceptions: Multiple projectile arty have → 1.25 (this overrides the next exception)<br>Exceptions: Single Entity Arty have → 2.01F32
scaling_damageIf damage calculation has to be scaled based on different rulesprojectiles_scaling_damages_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
is_spellIs the damage affected by spell resistance!falseBoolean
vegetation_ignore_time-1F32
missile_mirror_start_time0.4000000059604645F32
spawned_vortexvortex that is spawned on collision with the groundbattle_vortexs_tables.vortex_keyOptionalStringU8
projectile_shot_type_displayprojectile_shot_type_displays_tables.keyplaceholderStringU8

special_ability_phases_tables v44 (9 versions) · 32 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
durationF32
effect_typespecial_ability_phase_effect_types_tables.effect_typeStringU8
KEY idStringU8
requested_stancespecial_ability_stance_enums_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
cant_moveMakes the unit unable to be given movement or attack orders (entities can still shoot, use abilities or react to melee).falseBoolean
freeze_fatigueMakes the unit fatigue state 0 (=fresh) for duration of phasefalseBoolean
fatigue_change_ratioThis is a scalar that changes the unit\'s fatigue (PER SECOND) relative to the maximum. For example, -0.25 will reduce it by 25% and 0.1 will increase it by 10%0F32
inspiration_aura_range_mod0F32
ability_recharge_changeif the unit has abilities, their recharge will be changed by that amount (negative will reduce the time, positive will increase the time)0F32
hp_change_frequencyIn seconds, how often hp (hit point) change should attempt to be applied0F32
damage_amountPer entity, per frequency, what the amount of damage to apply. Note amounts under 4 do not work well on small unit sizes.0I32
max_damaged_entitiesPer damage/heal frequency, how many entities can we affect (negative is no limit)-1I32
resurrectIf ticked, when healing excess hit points will resurrect dead soldiersfalseBoolean
mana_regen_modHow much we add to the current recharge for mana per second0F32
mana_max_depletion_modHow much we add to the current value for max mana depletionF32
imbue_magicalDoes this phase imbue the target with magical attacks?falseBoolean
imbue_ignitionDoes this phase imbue the target with flaming attacks?0I32
imbue_contactDoes this phase imbue the target with a contact phase when attacking?special_ability_phases_tables.idOptionalStringU8
phase_displayAdd groups of visual effectsspecial_ability_phase_displays_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
phase_audioaudio_ability_phases_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
is_hidden_in_uiIf true, will not show up in UIfalseBoolean
affects_alliestrueBoolean
affects_enemiestrueBoolean
replenish_ammoHow much ammunition we want to replenish when phase starts (can be negative if we want to spend), this value is in percentage of unit max ammo0F32
composite_scene_groupComposite scene group we need to trigger when the phase startsbattle_vortex_composite_scene_groups_tables.group_idOptionalStringU8
spreadingspecial_ability_spreadings_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
freeze_rechargeAbilities on the target do not recharge while this phase is activefalseBoolean
heal_amountWhen HP (hit points) are healed, how much total should be changed, spread amoungst the entitiesF32
barrier_heal_amountEach hp_change_frequency ticks, the barrier will heal by this proportion of max_barrier_health0F32
remove_magicalfalseBoolean
execute_ratioAt or below this ratio of health the ability will instantly kill its target0F32
onscreen_nameStringU8

KEY child_idThis is the child id in the layout to apply this information forStringU8
icon_pathThis is the icon/image path to set for this entry that lives in working_data/ui/skins/default as a pngOptionalStringU8
KEY ui_tooltipThis is the entry in ui tooltips, the layout to useui_tooltips_tables.keyStringU8
state_nameOptional override state name for component. Used for example if have an icon with multiple states like happy/sad, etc.OptionalStringU8
is_visibleDefaults to true, if set to false will hide the component. Useful for if want to say have an effect_list tooltip but without a title or description, in which case can just hide ittrueBoolean

slopeIt\'s the multiplier for the mp_cost of the units in the formula unit_quality = mp_cost * slope + offset<br>For more details search Unit qualities Balance System Update in ConfluenceF32

only_affect_targetThe ability will only affect the target unit and will not search near unitsBoolean

passivefalseBoolean

targetting_aoeThis is the area of effect to display when targettingarea_of_effect_displays_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
passive_aoeThis is the area of effect to display when ability has been ordered but not yet cast (like if unit has to move their to cast)area_of_effect_displays_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
active_aoeThis is the area of effect to display when ability is currently active (has been cast)area_of_effect_displays_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
activation_effectThis is an optional one-shot vfx to display when cast to acknowledge order givenparticle_effects_tables.keyOptionalStringU8

audioaudio_abilities_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
special_ability_displayWhen wind_up_stance has an animation added, and windup_time is set to greater than zero, this references a table where you can override effects in the animations metadata. The effect metadata needs to be set to be set to ability_weapon and ability_aura.special_ability_displays_tables.sa_display_keyOptionalStringU8
voiceover_statethe state for the voiceover that\'s played when this ability is activated (if any)audio_vo_battle_special_ability_states_tables.keyvo_battle_special_ability_generic_responseStringU8
additional_melee_cpMelee Combat Potential that is added to any unit that has this ability/item (from table: main_units). Must be >= 0.0 or the game will crash on startup.0F32
additional_missile_cpMissile Combat Potential that is added to any unit that has this ability/item (from table: main_units). Must be >= 0.0 or the game will crash on startup.0F32
parent_abilityHack for spell browser in warhammer because designers want to put in specialised versions of abilities for certain characters. An ability with a parent wont show in browser, instead only parent is shown.unit_special_abilities_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
spawn_typespecial_ability_spawn_types_tables.keyOptionalStringU8
spawn_proxy_vfxVfx to show over each proxy decal when targetting spawn spellparticle_effects_tables.keyOptionalStringU8

target_ground_under_enemiesfalseBoolean
miscast_global_bonusSetting this to false stops miscast chance modifiers from affecting the abilitytrueBoolean

use_loop_stanceEntities will play a loop locomotion stancefalseBoolean
update_phase_by_ability_durationfalseBoolean
spawn_is_transformationIf spawning a unit will mean the owner unit will be replaced by the spawned onefalseBoolean
spawn_is_decoyIf spawning a unit the new one will be understood as a decoy of the owner one, the UI will show data for the owning onefalseBoolean
only_affect_owned_unitsfalseBoolean

affect_siege_equipmentIf true affects siege equipment entitiestrueBoolean
shared_recharge_timeIf provided will set this cooldown timer to all abilities on same group that have the field set-1F32
intensity_based_activationActivates automatically when intensity is above 0 and deactivates otherwisefalseBoolean

mp_experience_cost_multiplierrounded_cost(cost\u{a0}*\u{a0}xp_record->m_mp_experience_cost_multiplier) +\u{a0}xp_record->m_mp_fixed_cost0F32
additional_melee_cpMelee Combat Potential that is added to any unit that has this ability/item (from table: main_units). Must be >= 0.0 or the game will crash on startup.0F32
additional_missile_cpMissile Combat Potential that is added to any unit that has this ability/item (from table: main_units). Must be >= 0.0 or the game will crash on startup.0F32

variants_tables v6 (2 versions) · 8 columns
NameDescription / Enum valuesReferenceDefaultType
KEY variant_nameStringU8
tech_folderOptionalStringU8
variant_filenameOptionalStringU8
low_poly_filenameOptionalStringU8
mount_scaleSpecial mount scale. Cavalry riders will not automatically match this scale.1F32
scaleA multiplier that dictates the visual scale of an entity. i.e. Setting this to 2 will make your unit 200% bigger than the scale that the asset has been authored at.<br><br>If this variant is a rider of a War Beast macro entity, this multiplier will not have any effect. A rider\'s scale is set by the mount. <br><br>Note: This does not matter for Chariots, which use the rider scale independantly of the mount scale.<br><br>If this variant is a mount of a War Beast macro entity, set it to the scale that you wish the rider to be. Then adjust the value in the mount_scale column in order to multiply up to the value you want. i.e. If an Arachnarok Spider is scale 4, but has a character rider that is scale 1.15, set the scale to be 1.15, then the mount_scale to be 3.48 (in order to multiply back up to 4).<br><br>Sync Rider Cavalry variants must be configured to use an agreed-upon scale before animation begins, in order to avoid de-sycnchronisation.<br><br>1F32
scale_variationThe randomised \'micro\' scale.0F32
super_low_poly_filenameOptionalStringU8
